upasargachandrika.example_text: 'IrzyA jeyA tato rAgaH svayamASAH palAyate' (rAjata॰3.521) atra palAyatiH sakarmakaH ASA iti ca karma ASAH=diSaH
'yo vAM prARo balaM yacca yA ca vo vEritA'surAH tatkftvA hfdaye cEva palAyaDvamitaH puram' (mAtsya pu0 1396) palAyaDvaM SIGraM DAvata
'yatrA naraH samayante kftaDvajo yasminnAjA Bavati kiM cana priyam' (f॰7.83.2) samayante=saNgacCante (yuyutsayA)
'yajYasya vidvAn samaye na DIraH' (aTarva॰2.35.3) samayante saNgacCante yodDAro'treti samayaH saNgrAmaH
'pOzRaM samudayantaM' (dugDam) (E0 brA0 426) samudayantaM samudayamAnaM santApavaSAdUrDvaM gacCat
'yo BiyAto nilayate' (aTarva0 11213) nilayate=nirayate (nisaH prayogaScet) nizkrAmati apayAtItyarTaH
'asitaM te nilayanamAsTAnamasitaM tava' (tE0 brA0 2441) nilayanaM rakzAsTAnam SaraRam
'prasUtyA agnirdeveByo nilAyata' (tE0 saM0 5114) nilAyata niragacCat tiro'Datta tirohito'BUt
'niDAyodaharaRaM trirvipalyayate' (Sa0 brA0 9126) vipalyayate parikrAmati upasargarePasya latvam udaharaRaM GawaH udakumBaH
'yo adya stena Ayati saM sampizwo apAyati' (aTarva0 435) Ayati=Ayate=AyAti
'so'gneH kfzRo rUpaM kftvodAyata' (tE0 saM0 526) udAyata nirAyata nirakrAmat
'asurA vajramudyatya devAnaByAyanta' (tE0 saM0 6274) aByAyanta aBimuKamAgaman upAdravan
